description: This sub-concept describes the immediate action taken – whether the person quickly withdraws their hand or hesitates.
positive: My hand recoiled instantly from the hot pan, a swift 'away!' movement, subito.
La mano si ritrasse rapidamente dal metallo rovente, a reflex, un gesto immediato.
Zieh die Hand schnell zurück! The burn was unexpected, a rapid withdrawal.
J’ai retiré ma main aussitôt, a sharp, almost involuntary, 'ouch!' response.
Retiré mi mano al instante; the heat demanded a quick escape, un'azione rapida.
The fingertip jerked back from the scorching surface, a fast and decisive 'no'.
Immediatamente, la mano si è allontanata dal ferro incandescente, a sudden impulse.
Schnell! Meine Hand zog sich zurück; the heat was intense, a rapid rejection.
J’ai vite reculé ma main, a physical aversion, an immediate reflex action.
Mi mano se ha ritirato velocemente dal vaso caldo, a quick, instinctive movement.
The forearm flinched and pulled away swiftly, a rapid and protective withdrawal.
Retiré rápidamente mi mano; the heat surprised me, a swift reaction.
My palm darted back from the hot plate, a quick and almost violent reaction.
La mano si è ritratta istantaneamente dal metallo, a rapid, defensive action.
Zieh dich schnell zurück! The surface was unexpectedly hot, a fast escape.
J’ai retiré ma main rapidement, a visceral aversion, a swift rejection.
Mi mano si è ritirata velocemente dal forno, a rapid and decisive movement.
The wrist snapped back sharply, a quick and involuntary reaction.
Retiré mi mano al instante; the sensation was unpleasant, a swift response.
My shoulder instinctively pulled back, a rapid and protective withdrawal.
negative: Hesitation before pulling back, a moment of uncertainty, 'perhaps it's not so hot?' – in italiano.
A slight pause before withdrawing, a brief moment of consideration, 'is it really that hot?'
Zögernd zog ich meine Hand zurück; a moment of doubt, 'maybe it's bearable'.
J’ai hésité avant de retirer ma main, a moment of indecision, a brief pause.
Una breve esitazione prima di ritirare la mano, una pausa pensierosa, 'non sarà così male'.
A lingering touch, a moment of indecision, a slow and hesitant withdrawal.
Esitando, ritrassi la mano dal metallo, a moment of uncertainty, 'forse non è così caldo'.
Ich zögerte, meine Hand zurückzuziehen; a fleeting thought, 'it might not be so bad'.
J’ai marqué un temps avant de retirer ma main, a brief hesitation, a moment of doubt.
Mi mano esitò prima di ritirarsi, a moment of contemplation, 'non fa così male'.
A delayed reaction, a moment of hesitation, 'let me just feel it a little more'.
Retrasé mi mano lentamente; a moment of doubt, 'maybe it's not so hot'.
The fingers lingered briefly, a moment of hesitation before withdrawal.
La mano indugiò prima di ritirarsi, a brief pause, 'forse posso sopportarlo'.
Ich zögerte kurz, meine Hand zurückzuziehen; a fleeting thought, 'it’s not unbearable'.
J’ai hésité un instant avant de retirer ma main, a brief pause, a moment of consideration.
Mi mano si ritrasse lentamente, una pausa esitante, 'non è poi così male'.
A brief delay, a moment of hesitation, 'just a little longer'.
Retrasé mi mano con lentitud; a moment of indecision, 'it might not be so bad'.
The wrist remained momentarily, a hesitation before a quick withdrawal.
